sourceMovie.title: Bottoms
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Bottoms (2023) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Emma Seligman's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: School of Rock
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Bottoms clicked for you, School of Rock (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Bottoms?
faq.answer: Try School of Rock, The DUFF, Office Space—each shares DNA with Bottoms while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Bottoms?
faq.answer: Bottoms (2023) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Bottoms worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
